title: galarhoeus glareosus
intro: Galarhoeus glareosus, also known as the 'Chinese gallnut tree' or ' Chinese gallnut', is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Galarhoeus glareosus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and fever. Galarhoeus glareosus is typically prepared as a decoction or tincture for medicinal use, and its extracts have been studied for their potential to inhibit the growth of certain types of cancer cells.
